steps.t: The ruins of Tuntham can be found north-east of Bâr Húrin. You should enter the suspicious building at Tuntham.
The ruins of Tuntham can be found north-east of Bâr Húrin. You should enter the suspicious building at Tuntham.
The ruins of Tuntham can be found north-east of Bâr Húrin. You should destroy the Orkish plans you found within one of the buildings in Tuntham.
